scripts.migrate:reset: node migrate down --step 99 && node migrate up
scripts.db:drop: docker exec -it mysql_db mysql -u root -proot -e 'DROP DATABASE db_api;'
scripts.db:create: docker exec -it mysql_db mysql -u root -proot -e 'CREATE DATABASE db_api;'
scripts.db:rebuild: npm run db:drop && npm run db:create && npm run migrate
scripts.prod: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run start
scripts.db:rebuild:seed: echo supression de la db, création de la db, migration, seed && npm run db:rebuild && npm run seed
